steps.title: Look for agency and authority
steps.content: The claim says the soldiers set off with renewed agency and authority. The best quotation should show them acting with confidence and control, not merely hearing sounds, seeing scenery, or showing reverence.

steps.title: Reject passive scene details
steps.content: Choice A focuses on bells and voices. Choice B describes landscape and travel. Choice D shows a character kissing the ground, which suggests reverence rather than a group asserting control. The answer is C.
